query:
SELECT gutenbergId, title, authors, copyrightProtectedUntil
FROM books
WHERE authors LIKE '%Aristotel%'
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3ro9iHMnksteyBe.2f084ba63ba1 --database 8bBPXpc4UL9EF8BMEK3VX4 --execute
